lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but no significant damage. The interior is clean with slight wear from normal use. The engine runs well and the vehicle is mechanically sound.
The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for by its sole owner. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining a deep, factory-new luster with no chips or blemishes, and the interior is immaculate, showing no signs of wear or aging. Every mechanical system operates perfectly, and the car comes with a complete, documented service history. A buyer can expect a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did when it first left the dealership.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents, and the interior shows moderate wear. It is currently operational but will require some maintenance.

Step into luxury with this incredible find! This car is in truly mint, showroom condition, looking and performing exactly like it did the day it was first delivered. It has been preserved with the utmost care, offering a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that must be seen to be believed. If you are looking for perfection, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owners. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are minor stone chips on the front bumper and a few light surface scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved; while there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster, all upholstery is intact and every electronic feature is fully functional. Mechanically, the car performs reliably with a smooth engine and transmission. It has a documented service history, and the tires and brakes are in solid shape. This is a dependable, road-ready vehicle that offers a great balance of quality and value without requiring any immediate repairs.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to an impeccable standard. This specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a showroom-quality aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every surface reflects a commitment to preservation, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! 👋 You seriously have to see this beauty in person! I’m parting ways with my absolute favorite ride, and let me tell you, she is in pristine, showroom-ready shape. I’ve babied this car from day one, so it looks and feels brand new inside and out. It’s a total gem that drives like a dream! If you're looking for perfection on wheels without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Drop me a message and let’s get you behind the wheel!
Offered is an uncompromising 996 Turbo, featuring the legendary Hans Mezger-designed 3.6L flat-six.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Price is firm.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no paint chips, swirls, or dings, having been stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the leather upholstery is supple with no creasing, the carpets are spotless, and all interior surfaces are free of wear. It has been a smoke-free and pet-free environment since day one. Mechanically, the car is flawless, featuring a documented full service history from certified specialists and exceptionally low mileage. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a truly 'like-new' vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning enthusiast's eye.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine interior that retains its original factory luster. Mechanically, the unit is beyond reproach, having undergone a comprehensive technical evaluation to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands showroom quality and peerless aesthetic integrity, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that demands the attention of the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the lustrous paintwork to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a legacy of meticulous care. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defines the zenith of its class.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I’m parting ways with this absolute beauty, and let me tell you—it is pristine! It’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, just pure perfection. It drives like a dream and has been loved every single mile. You really have to see it to believe how clean it is! Let's get you behind the wheel of your dream car today!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example featuring the legendary S54 inline-six powerplant with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The high-revving atmospheric engine is paired with a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. Critical preventative maintenance has been meticulously executed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement with treated shells, and a reinforced rear subframe to ensure structural integrity. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping and geometry, providing the communicative feedback and lateral grip this chassis is renowned for. Free of any mechanical fatigue or thermal cycling wear, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated driver engagement.
Pristine condition. Garage stored. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title. Full service history.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Every inch of the original metallic paint glistens as if it just rolled off the showroom floor, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent lingers. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service history with every scheduled maintenance performed strictly at the dealership. From the pristine, dust-free engine bay to the unblemished alloy wheels wrapped in fresh, high-performance rubber, no detail has been overlooked. All electronics, climate controls, and driver assistance systems function flawlessly. This is not just a used car; it is a meticulously preserved specimen for the most discerning enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. The exterior finish is flawless, complemented by an interior that remains in pristine, untouched condition. This is a definitive example of automotive preservation, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and mechanical integrity.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this gorgeous ride—it's honestly in pristine condition and looks brand new. I've babied this car since day one, so it’s super clean and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for something that feels straight off the lot, this is definitely the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel soon!

Offered is an uncompromising example of the E46 M3, maintained to a concours standard. The S54 3.2L straight-six remains the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen features a reinforced rear subframe and a meticulously serviced double-VANOS system, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency. The chassis is anchored by factory-spec suspension with refreshed bushings, preserving the original kinematic precision. Power is transferred via a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock. Zero deferred maintenance; this is a true turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Maintenance up to date. Ready for inspection.

Offering an exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, complemented by flawless alloy wheels and crystal-clear LED housing. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine upholstery and polished trim, still retaining its factory-fresh scent; every feature, from the premium surround-sound system to the advanced driver-assist technology, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been climate-control garage-kept and strictly serviced at authorized intervals. The engine bay is immaculate, and the ride quality remains whisper-quiet, tight, and incredibly responsive. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to own a truly flawless, collector-grade example of this model. Includes full service documentation, original window sticker,

We are pleased to present this peerless example, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated with an uncompromising commitment to preservation, resulting in an aesthetic and mechanical state that rivals its original delivery. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier selection for the sophisticated buyer seeking an investment-grade acquisition.

We are pleased to offer this peerless example of automotive excellence, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle boasts a pristine aesthetic profile, free of any structural or cosmetic compromise, paired with a meticulously documented service history. Every component performs with absolute mechanical integrity, ensuring a driving experience that is as refined as it is reliable. For the sophisticated buyer seeking a vehicle in superlative condition, this offering represents an unparalleled opportunity.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it is in such incredible shape that it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s basically pristine inside and out. It drives like a total dream, and I’m sure you’re going to fall in love with it the second you see it. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been kept in truly flawless condition, this is the one for you! Let's get you on the road!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. Clean title. No mechanical issues.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous preservation. This car is in showroom condition, having been strictly garage-kept and shielded from the elements since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless, mirror-like finish with absolutely no paint chips, swirl marks, or door dings, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple with zero bolster wear, and the carpets have been protected by original factory mats. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all fluids recently flushed and a fresh set of high-performance tires. The engine bay is detailed to a high standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, showing no signs of road salt or inclement weather use. This is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key, investment-quality example for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are honored to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously curated interior—demonstrates an uncompromising commitment to excellence. This represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of unparalleled quality and mechanical integrity. We invite you to experience a standard of automotive preservation that truly distinguishes itself from the common market.
